revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839598]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 20|qq=May 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|ShakkЕҚ|ja|иөӨеҸЈ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShakkЕҚ|1=ShakkЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor Gaozu of Tang|Li Yuan]] received abdication from [[:en:Yang You|Sui Emperor Gongdi You]] of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang]]. * [[:en:ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|ChЕҚhЕҚ]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]]) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] the offices of [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]] and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * [[:en:ЕҢnin|ЕҢnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) вҖ“ During the [[:en:ЕҢnin War|ЕҢnin War]], commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and [[:en:Hatakeyama Yoshinari|Hatakeyama Yoshinobu]] raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|19|5|21|4|20|6|5|0520|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839598]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 20|qq=May 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|ShakkЕҚ|ja|иөӨеҸЈ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShakkЕҚ|1=ShakkЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor Gaozu of Tang|Li Yuan]] received abdication from [[:en:Yang You|Sui Emperor Gongdi You]] of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang]]. * [[:en:ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|ChЕҚhЕҚ]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]]) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] the offices of [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]] and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * [[:en:ЕҢnin|ЕҢnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) вҖ“ During the [[:en:ЕҢnin War|ЕҢnin War]], commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and [[:en:Hatakeyama Yoshinari|Hatakeyama Yoshinobu]] raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|19|5|21|4|20|6|5|0520|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839598]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 20|qq=May 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|ShakkЕҚ|ja|иөӨеҸЈ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShakkЕҚ|1=ShakkЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor Gaozu of Tang|Li Yuan]] received abdication from [[:en:Yang You|Sui Emperor Gongdi You]] of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang]]. * [[:en:ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|ChЕҚhЕҚ]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]]) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] the offices of [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]] and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * [[:en:ЕҢnin|ЕҢnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) вҖ“ During the [[:en:ЕҢnin War|ЕҢnin War]], commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and [[:en:Hatakeyama Yoshinari|Hatakeyama Yoshinobu]] raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|19|5|21|4|20|6|5|0520|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|19|5|21|4|20|6|5|0520|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh_min_nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh_yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh_min_nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh_yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839598]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 20|qq=May 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|ShakkЕҚ|ja|иөӨеҸЈ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShakkЕҚ|1=ShakkЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor Gaozu of Tang|Li Yuan]] received abdication from [[:en:Yang You|Sui Emperor Gongdi You]] of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the [[:en:Tang dynasty|Tang]]. * [[:en:ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|ChЕҚhЕҚ]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:July 5|July 5]]) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]] the offices of [[:en:Minister of the Left|Minister of the Left]] and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * [[:en:ЕҢnin|ЕҢnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1467|1467]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) вҖ“ During the [[:en:ЕҢnin War|ЕҢnin War]], commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and [[:en:Hatakeyama Yoshinari|Hatakeyama Yoshinobu]] raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Empress Suiko|Empress Suiko]] 34th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:626|626]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]], a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa [[:en:551|551]])<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1234|1234]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ]], the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa [[:en:1218|1218]]). * [[:en:MeiЕҚ|Meio]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1496|1496]] [[:en:June 30|June 30]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Hino Tomiko|Hino Tomiko]], wife of [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshimasa|Ashikaga Yoshimasa]] (born circa [[:en:1440|1440]]). * [[:en:KeichЕҚ|KeichЕҚ]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1614|1614]] [[:en:June 27|June 27]]) вҖ“ [[:en:Maeda Toshinaga|Maeda Tosanaga]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Kaga Domain|Kaga Domain]] (born [[:en:1562|1562]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguЕҸk 20 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:5жңҲ20ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј]][[zh-min-nan:5 goeМҚh 20 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]][[zh:дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839598]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 20|qq=May 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дә”жңҲдәҢеҚҒ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 5мӣ” 20мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5жңҲ (ж—§жҡҰ)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|ShakkЕҚ|ja|иөӨеҸЈ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShakkЕҚ|1=ShakkЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Emperor Gaozu of Tang|en|Emperor Gaozu of Tang|WD=Q9700|lt=Li Yuan}} received abdication from {{ill|Yang You|en|Yang You|WD=Q7420|lt=Sui Emperor Gongdi You}} of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|WD=Q9683|lt=Tang}}. * {{ill|ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|en|ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|WD=Q1324844|lt=ChЕҚhЕҚ}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|999|en|999|WD=Q277307|lt=999}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}}) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} the offices of {{ill|Minister of the Left|en|Minister of the Left|WD=Q949008|lt=Minister of the Left}} and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * {{ill|ЕҢnin|en|ЕҢnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=ЕҢnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|WD=Q6561|lt=1467}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) вҖ“ During the {{ill|ЕҢnin War|en|ЕҢnin War|WD=Q385676|lt=ЕҢnin War}}, commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and {{ill|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|en|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|WD=Q11578676|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu}} raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko}} 34th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|626|en|626|WD=Q31052|lt=626}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Soga no Umako|en|Soga no Umako|WD=Q1191233|lt=Soga no Umako}}, a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa {{ill|551|en|551|WD=Q30943|lt=551}})<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|en|Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|WD=Q357253|lt=ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ}}, the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa {{ill|1218|en|1218|WD=Q5381|lt=1218}}). * {{ill|MeiЕҚ|en|MeiЕҚ|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meio}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Hino Tomiko|en|Hino Tomiko|WD=Q5306708|lt=Hino Tomiko}}, wife of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|en|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|WD=Q447034|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimasa}} (born circa {{ill|1440|en|1440|WD=Q6384|lt=1440}}). * {{ill|KeichЕҚ|en|KeichЕҚ|WD=Q1328185|lt=KeichЕҚ}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|en|Maeda Toshinaga|WD=Q1186742|lt=Maeda Tosanaga}}, the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Kaga Domain|en|Kaga Domain|WD=Q903448|lt=Kaga Domain}} (born {{ill|1562|en|1562|WD=Q6621|lt=1562}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Wutoku|ja|жӯҰеҫі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wutoku|1=Wude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1041688}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Emperor Gaozu of Tang|en|Emperor Gaozu of Tang|WD=Q9700|lt=Li Yuan}} received abdication from {{ill|Yang You|en|Yang You|WD=Q7420|lt=Sui Emperor Gongdi You}} of the Sui dynasty and ascended the throne (as Emperor Gaozu), marking the establishment of the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|WD=Q9683|lt=Tang}}. * {{ill|ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|en|ChЕҚhЕҚ (era)|WD=Q1324844|lt=ChЕҚhЕҚ}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|999|en|999|WD=Q277307|lt=999}} {{ill|July 5|en|July 5|WD=Q2696|lt=July 5}}) вҖ“ An imperial edict posthumously awarded {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}} the offices of {{ill|Minister of the Left|en|Minister of the Left|WD=Q949008|lt=Minister of the Left}} and {{ill|Senior First Rank|lt=Senior First Rank|lt=ShЕҚichii|ja|жӯЈдёҖдҪҚ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕҚichii|qq=}}, and established the {{ill|Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja|еҢ—йҮҺзҘһзӨҫ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Tenmangu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еҢ—йҮҺеӨ©жәҖе®®|1=Kitano TenmangЕ«|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}}. * {{ill|ЕҢnin|en|ЕҢnin|WD=Q1143903|lt=ЕҢnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1467|en|1467|WD=Q6561|lt=1467}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) вҖ“ During the {{ill|ЕҢnin War|en|ЕҢnin War|WD=Q385676|lt=ЕҢnin War}}, commanders such as {{ill|Yamana Mochitoyo|ja|еұұеҗҚжҢҒиұҠ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mochitoyo|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еұұеҗҚе®—е…Ё|1=Yamana SЕҚzen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1355689}} and {{ill|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|en|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|WD=Q11578676|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu}} raised armies.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|WD=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko}} 34th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|626|en|626|WD=Q31052|lt=626}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Soga no Umako|en|Soga no Umako|WD=Q1191233|lt=Soga no Umako}}, a courtier and father of {{ill|Soga no Ezo|ja|иҳҮжҲ‘Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=иҳҮжҲ‘иқҰеӨ·|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} (born circa {{ill|551|en|551|WD=Q30943|lt=551}})<ref name="seinengappi">{{Cite book | title=жү¶жЎ‘з•ҘиЁҳ | publisher= | year= | page= | note=Calculated from an age of 76; some sources associate his name вҖңUmakoвҖқ with a birth year in the [[GengЕҚ]] of Emperor Kinmei |qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpuku (Japan)|ja|еӨ©зҰҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpuku (Japan)|1=Tenpuku (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1305722}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1234|en|1234|WD=Q5424|lt=1234}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|en|Emperor ChЕ«kyЕҚ|WD=Q357253|lt=ChukЕҚ TennЕҚ}}, the 85th Emperor of Japan (born circa {{ill|1218|en|1218|WD=Q5381|lt=1218}}). * {{ill|MeiЕҚ|en|MeiЕҚ|WD=Q1193841|lt=Meio}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496}} {{ill|June 30|en|June 30|WD=Q2657|lt=June 30}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Hino Tomiko|en|Hino Tomiko|WD=Q5306708|lt=Hino Tomiko}}, wife of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|en|Ashikaga Yoshimasa|WD=Q447034|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimasa}} (born circa {{ill|1440|en|1440|WD=Q6384|lt=1440}}). * {{ill|KeichЕҚ|en|KeichЕҚ|WD=Q1328185|lt=KeichЕҚ}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|WD=Q2664|lt=June 27}}) вҖ“ {{ill|Maeda Toshinaga|en|Maeda Toshinaga|WD=Q1186742|lt=Maeda Tosanaga}}, the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Kaga Domain|en|Kaga Domain|WD=Q903448|lt=Kaga Domain}} (born {{ill|1562|en|1562|WD=Q6621|lt=1562}}).
